message:
feat(freeze): migrate from C to Zig codegen for frozen functions

Replace C code generation with pure Zig for frozen functions, enabling:
- Single compilation unit for cross-function inlining
- Full LTO support on macOS (where C LTO is broken)
- Unified codebase (one language instead of two)

Changes:
- build.zig: Add frozen_module and zig_runtime as Zig imports
- runtime.zig: Generate frozen_module.zig alongside frozen_functions.c
- wasm_main_static.zig: Use Zig frozen_init instead of C extern
- zig_codegen_full.zig: Add string escaping for property names
- zig_runtime.zig: Add native shape access helpers
- frozen_registry.zig: Extend generateModuleZig with frozen_init

The WASM build now uses Zig frozen functions while native builds
still use C codegen for compatibility.
